text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I drop by the dance studio to pick up some stuff I
forgot, only to find it occupied.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Sigh... This choreography is pretty tough. There's nothing special about it, but it's still tricky...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Oh, hey, Trainer. Didn't realize you were there.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Nice Nature is practicing hard, but I notice
something about the choreography...
choice_data_list: Isn't that dance for the side positions?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
This? Yeah... I have a feeling I'll be dancing these
parts a lot.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
So doesn't it make sense to focus on them when
practicing?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her defeatist attitude towards her own potential
takes me aback, and I'm left struggling for words.
choice_data_list: Recommend practicing for the center spot.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Huh... I was expecting you to tell me to practice
for the center spot.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Nice Nature knows what works for her best. I'd
rather respect how she feels than rush her.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But I don't want to deny her potential either.
That's why...
choice_data_list:
At the same time, let's make it the most
captivating performance ever!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: You and your silver tongue...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: All right, all right. Thanks.
choice_data_list: You know what, let's dance together!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: That's not necessary.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her tone says she's annoyed, but her expression
softens a little.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Center spot, huh? I figured you would say that.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She has the potential to come in first place, but
most importantly, I don't want her to give up from
the get-go.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Yeah, right...
choice_data_list: We just have to work hard! Come on!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: All right, all right. If you say so.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
I don't know how good my dancing will be,
considering how late I'm starting.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: But hey, if you believe in me, then maybe...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Nothiiing!
